attacking_style: Launches decisive attacks in final 8km of mountain finishes, timing moves after demonstrating strength on earlier climbs in the stage. Targets summit finishes with precision late-race accelerations.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to establish clear team tactical patterns across multiple races.
terrain_preference: Mountain stages with multiple categorized climbs culminating in summit finishes. Excels when earlier climbs like Mortirolo allow demonstration of form before final decisive move.
vulnerability: Limited data, but previously took second place at Chicchone before breakthrough win, suggesting potential vulnerability in earlier-season form or when attacks come too early.
key_patterns: Attacks with 8km remaining to summit finishes after showing presence on earlier stage climbs.
Bridges to breakaways rather than launching solo efforts, then outracing remnants to finish.
Form trajectory shows progression: second place at Chicchone, then stage win at Valle Santa Cristina.
form_trajectory: positive: recovered from earlier second place to deliver maiden Grand Tour stage win, demonstrating improving condition through Giro d'Italia
